summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Employee Management Controls feature. All 23 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI tests pass - all actions, dialogs, and filters verified.
passed_tests: POST /api/employees/{id}/archive - Returns 400 for already archived employee
GET /api/employees - Archived employees hidden by default
Archive action logged in audit trail
Restore action logged in audit trail
Permanent delete action logged in audit trail
Super Admin role verified for permanent delete
Employees list shows Actions column with dropdown menu
Actions menu shows Edit Details option
Actions menu shows Export File option
Actions menu shows Archive Employee option
Actions menu shows Delete Permanently option (Super Admin only)
Employee profile page has actions button next to compliance score
Edit Details dialog opens with pre-filled employee data
Edit dialog has all required fields (name, email, phone, role, status, assignment, start_date, notes)
Archive Employee confirmation dialog shows correct information
Permanent Delete confirmation dialog shows warning and affected data
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_employee_management.py - Created comprehensive API tests for Employee Management Controls
seed_data_creation: Test employees created and cleaned up during testing. 6 existing employees in system.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Management Controls fully functional. Archive (soft delete) retains all data and hides from active list. Restore brings back archived employees. Permanent delete (Super Admin only) removes employee and all related records. Edit dialog allows updating all employee fields. All actions are logged in audit trail.
